---
title: "About Me"
---

Hi, I’m Haydn Thomas.

I am a Financial Lines underwriting professional with experience in management liability insurance, including Directors & Officers (D&O), Employment Practices Liability (EPL), and Fiduciary lines. I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Insurance Management at Boston University, where I am continuing to build my knowledge in analytics, business strategy, and data-driven decision-making.

My academic and professional interests sit at the intersection of insurance, risk management, analytics, and business operations. Through my graduate coursework and portfolio projects, I am developing stronger technical skills while also building on my background in underwriting and financial risk evaluation.

## Professional Interests

- Insurance and risk management
- Data analytics and business intelligence
- Financial and management liability underwriting
- Business strategy and decision-making
- Entrepreneurship and real estate investing

## Career Goals

My goal is to continue growing as a business and insurance professional while strengthening my technical and analytical skill set. I am especially interested in roles and projects that combine business judgment, communication, and quantitative analysis to solve real-world problems.
